rd.customer_description: I am an IDFC SELECT customer. I do most of daily transactions through this account. This includes groceries, rent, payments made to cook/maid. I also occasionally order stuff from Amazon, and use this account for payment. Apart from this, I also do monthly SIP's in mutual funds, which are linked to my IDFC account. I also use my credit card/debit card to avail lounge access at domestic airports. I would like offers on dining/online purchases on my IDFC credit card. The list of products I own are Credit Crad, Debit Card, Savings Account, SIP/MF.

rsp.customer_description: I have been an IDFC Bank customer for last 4 years and I own a saving , select credit card and upi credit card. I frequently do transaction on upi credit card and use savings account as my salary account where I donot do much transactions
